title: INSERT INTO ... SELECT bypasses foreign key constraint checks
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount FLOAT, CONSTRAINT fk_user FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO orders (id, user_id, amount) SELECT 1, NULL, 100.00;
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO ... SELECT bypasses foreign key constraints
